/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/server/HttpServer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/http/HttpConn.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/http/parser/HttpRequest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/http/utils/MimeType.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/thread/ThreadPool.cpp.o -o server  -lpthread
